content.text:
Looking at the zoomed view of atom C:47, I can clearly identify its neighbor atoms by the covalent bonds connected to it.

**Atom C:47 is covalently connected to 4 neighbor atoms:**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|-------------|---------|
| 34 | C (Carbon) |
| 48 | H (Hydrogen) |
| 49 | H (Hydrogen) |
| 50 | H (Hydrogen) |

**geomconf_index:** 6957

This makes chemical sense - atom C:47 is a carbon atom forming a methyl group (CH₃) attached to the carbon skeleton at position C:34. It has one C-C bond to atom C:34 and three C-H bonds to atoms H:48, H:49, and H:50.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 47, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
